Our mission is to provide strategic, ethical, and client-focused legal solutions through proactive guidance, strong advocacy, and dependable representation, ensuring the protection of our clients’ interests with integrity and excellence.
With over 2 Years of experience, Dejure Law Office provides comprehensive legal services tailored to the nuances of your case. Our commitment to justice and client satisfaction defines our practice.

Amit Kumar is a law professional with more than 7 years of experience in dynamic environments with adaptability to the ever-changing demands of the legal field. Optimistic and confident in the courtroom, leveraging excellent argumentation techniques that boost the case.

He is experience to render advice and due diligence services on critical legal issues, as well as protect the interests of the clients based on proactive, precautionary and alternative legal measures.
Protecting trademarks, copyrights, patents, and intellectual assets through legal action, dispute resolution, enforcement, and defense against infringement claims.

Amit Kumar is a law professional with more than 7 years of experience in dynamic environments with adaptability to the ever-changing demands of the legal field. Optimistic and confident in the courtroom, leveraging excellent argumentation techniques that boost the case.
Appeared before various district courts of Delhi/NCR, NGT, Consumer Courts, High Courts, NCLT, NCLAT, RERA, REAT and the Supreme Court of India to represent the clients in different legal matters and also extended to drafting applications under Section 252 of Companies Act 2013 to request the revival of companies.
Expert guidance on Real Estate Regulatory Authority (RERA) matters including property disputes, registration, and compliance.

Cheque Bounce Cases, Recovery Suits, Injunction Matters, Cybercrime Complaints, Bail Matters, Consumer & Civil Litigation, Contract Drafting, Legal Research & Compliance, Business Registration & Taxation, Company Revival Applications and Miscellaneous Legal Applications.
Providing legal support for divorce, alimony, child custody, and settlement disputes.
Comprehensive legal solutions tailored to meet your specific needs with expertise and dedication
